module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt/step/execution orchestration and agent-side plan runtime storage. Step emits flat StepDraft model plan events, parses model JSON answers and plans, converts StepDraft values into StepId-backed runtime steps through Step::from_draft for Plan::from_draft, and ExecutionHub tracks tool executions keyed by execution signature before completing steps.

childModules.name: execution
childModules.purpose: Owns agent-side execution tracking: Execution values keyed by ExecutionSignature that accumulate ordered output and finalize on the expected update count, and an ExecutionHub holding a Mutex<HashMap<ExecutionSignature, Execution>> that spawns execution steps, routes Update/Succeed events, and emits StepEvent::Complete to the step layer on completion while reporting per-signature status.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. Internal backend implementations expose request directly instead of a send adapter.

childModules.name: plan
childModules.purpose: Owns agent-side plan runtime orchestration. Plan delegates StepDraft conversion to Step::from_draft without numeric step-number allocation, exposes run step signatures, and works with PlanHub, PlanRecord, PlanStringify, and PlanError for routing, storage, rendering, and invalid draft reporting.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Defines the agent prompt interface, render_template rendering, InitialPrompt, and AnalysisPrompt for execution-output analysis.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup/routing behavior, forwarding Task status/preview and Step events to clients through a matches! filter and routing task, step, execution, and plan events back to the owning Task worker, plus SessionContext snapshots for prompts.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns the agent runtime Step type, flat StepDraft to runtime StepKind conversion, task-step routing, internal Initial/Analysis flat StepDraft plan creation, model JSON answer/plan handling, model-prompt rendering, completion handling, and execution delegation.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns agent task runtime and TaskState (session context, plan_hub, an ExecutionHub owning execution tracking, and a StepId-keyed step queue); step routing lives on Step, plan events route to PlanHub, and execution spawning/routing lives in the execution hub.
